description_long: This is a weathered stone headstone set atop a multi-tiered rectangular base, surrounded by a patch of earth and debris. The front face of the headstone features engraved inscriptions, including a name, dates, and an epitaph, with a decorative relief of a sheaf of wheat at the top. The stone has a light gray coloration with visible signs of aging, such as discoloration and surface erosion, especially on the rear side. The base is composed of two stacked stone blocks, with the lower block being larger and more roughly finished. The headstone is solid and heavy, designed to remain fixed in place. The overall appearance is somber and respectful, typical of grave markers found in older cemeteries.
description: A weathered gray stone headstone with engraved inscriptions and a decorative relief, set on a multi-tiered stone base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the engraved inscriptions, decorative relief, and the stepped stone base.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the thickness of the headstone and the layered structure of the base.
description_view_2: The rear view displays discoloration and weathering, with no visible inscriptions or decorations.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the profile of the headstone and the stepped base, similar to the left side.
attribute_tombstone_inscriptions: KATTIE WIFE OF ROBERT J. HENDERSON BORN MCH. 22, 1879 DIED FEBY. 17, 1913
